name: Scotch Apple Pudding
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the apples into slices.
2. In a bowl, combine sugar, cinnamon, and salt.
3. Place half of the apple slices in a nonstick baking dish and sprinkle with half of the sugar mixture.
4. Dot the remaining apple slices with half of the butter.
5. Sprinkle all of the oats over the layers.
6. Arrange another series of layers and add milk.
7. Cover and bake at 350°F for 45 minutes.
8. Remove the cover and bake for an additional 15 minutes.
9. Serve hot or cold.
